name: Stage 2 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 2
Route: Mayan San Remo
Date: March 23-29

Keep the prize wheels and bike wheels spinning as we move it over to Mayan San Remo for Stage 2.

name: TCT Group Ride - Transplant Cycling Team
description: Club rides, racing and training together to raise awareness around organ and blood stem cell donation and transplantation and how this vital service can allow transplant athletes push through any perceived barriers.

eventSubgroups.name: TCT Group Ride - Transplant Cycling Team (E)

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt7 RUN
description: WTRL's Duathlon League offers a unique and thrilling racing experience by combining biking on Zwift with the choice of running on Zwift or outside in real life. This makes it accessible to everyone and the ultimate test of racing versatility!

name: Ascenders Run Training
description:
Ascenders Assemble Come and join Ascenders for a chilled run around various
Zwift courses. You're welcome to run at your own pace but the leader will
maintain a steady 9-12kph whatever the terrain. If you've ridden with us in
a group ride then you'll know we run supportive events so bring yourself
some snacks and your energy and we'll enjoy a nice run together. Ascenders
Assemble!

Join Ascenders Team on Facebook group that is all about friendships and
inclusitivity: http://www.facebook.com/groups/AscendersZwift

#ascendersteamsg #zwiftrun #runon

name: THE SYN 100
description:
Join us for "The SYN 100" group ride on TT bikes! 

This ride is all about teamwork, smooth rotations, and catching up with our community. 
Whether you’re joining to set the pace or sit in and enjoy the draft, what matters most is that you have fun!

We will be taking on 100 km at an average pace of 2.5-3w/kg, ETA +- 2.5 hours. 
Everyone will be on the Canyon Speedmax TT bike — so we’ll be rolling in full style and speed. Double draft is on! 

Perfect for boosting your stamina and endurance, this ride challenges you to hold a steady power output for a sustained duration.

Late join is active for the first 30 minutes of this ride.


3 SPRINTS WITH LEAD-OUT
Tempus Fugit is perfect for time trial efforts, group pacing, and steady endurance work. 
It features the Fuego Flats Sprint — 500 meters of all-out power!
We are riding 5 laps on Tempus Fugit. The first 3 laps we will be organising a sprint with lead-out! 


FINISHING WITH A CHASE
At the end of this ride we have "The spicy 5 ". We’ll lift the pace near the end with 5km to go and go for a fast finish for those who still have energy left. 
Others can just choose to easy spin at a nice pace to the finish line.


UNLOCK THE SYNDICATE CLUB KIT
Completing the full 100km ride today will result in unlocking the inverted SYN Kit that you will be wearing on this ride!
SYN Cycling Club also has other rides that unlock this kit, make sure to check them out!


DISCOVER MORE IN THE SYN ZWIFT CLUB
Enjoyed this ride? Feel free to join our Zwift Club (SYN Cycling Club), and discover all our events:
https://bit.ly/SYNZwiftClub

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt8 BIKE
description: WTRL's Duathlon League offers a unique and thrilling racing experience by combining biking on Zwift with the choice of running on Zwift or outside in real life. This makes it accessible to everyone and the ultimate test of racing versatility!

name: Hercules - Wild West Wednesday
description:
Join our Wild West Wednesday - a super friendly and inclusive group run on Zwift!

You can walk, jog or race, everyone is welcome.

Expect great chat, good vibes, and a welcoming atmosphere for all runners, whether you're new to Zwift or a seasoned pro.

Leader is happy to run as slow as the slowest runner to make everyone feel included in the event.

Please join our Zwift Club at https://www.zwift.com/uk/clubs/d6581e47-deb2-46ed-a278-5777d5d2fd0f/home

Please join our Facebook Group at https://www.facebook.com/groups/2606407819659263/

Please join us online at https://herculesrunningandtri.com/

Please join us on Strava at https://www.strava.com/clubs/herculesrunningandtriclub

If you would like to own our famous Pink & Black Club Kit in real life, please order at https://tinyurl.com/herculestrirun

name: Workout 2 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 2: Body Control
This one’s got a little bit of everything: single-leg drills, hand positioning, and calm upper-body control are all on deck, keeping you confident and smooth from start to finish.

name: Rapha Women's 100 Training Ride
description:
She’s your greatest competition. Your loudest cheerleader. The one you want to beat. The one you want to win. Rapha and Zwift are celebrating best rivals and fierce friends. The women who give us a wheel to chase. A line to follow. A reason not to hit snooze. Because friendly competition pulls us forward. The harder you go, the further she’ll get.

Join us as we build up to the biggest women's participation event in cycling, the Rapha Women's 100. Returning 5th-6th September 2026.

name: Ascenders Midweek Ride
description:
About Midweek Ride:
This ride offers a balanced mix of flat roads and hill climbs. Riders will follow the pace set by the ride leader to ensure we complete the event together as a group.
It’s perfect for novices and newer riders looking for steady group climbing.

name: Stage 2: Pas Racing: Handful of Gravel
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: Phoenix Rising Midweek Meander
description:
It's time for Phoenix Rising's Midweek Meander! This is a D paced ride designed to allow a wide range of riders to join in the fun and get what they need, whether it's a workout, warm up/down or recovery. Join us for this chatty, social ride, where riders of all levels can experience a sense of community with others from all over the world. The pace will be in the range of 1.4 - 1.7 w/kg but may go slightly higher on any climbs and lower on descents depending on the ride leader's weight. Sticking with the yellow beacon rather than flying ahead is appreciated. The fence will be activated as a guide and sweeps will be on hand to assist those who lose the draft. We want everyone to feel supported and part of the group. Our routes change weekly, promising fresh challenges and new horizons on routes that are always somewhat flat-ish. Let's soar together as we chase away those midweek blahs!

For more information on all our weekly events, join our club Phoenix Rising on Zwift Companion.

Join us on Discord during the ride: https://discord.gg/mNMva8ekJR
Check us out on Facebook https://www.facebook.com/groups/615972979730125/

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - ZG25 Climb Champs
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: BC Bike Race Endurance Workout
description:
Since 2007, athletes from 65 different countries have been racing the Ultimate Singletrack Adventure in British Columbia, Canada and now, BC Bike Race is bringing you a new experience to Zwift.
The BC Bike Race Endurance Workout is a weekly ride designed to help build your endurance during the winter months in preparation for the summer to shred singletrack.
For more information please visit bcbikerace.com

name: EZR Wednesday Short Ride (Banded)
description:
All riders are welcome to join this EZ Riders (EZR) fun, social group ride. This ride will utilize the rubberband, so riders of all abilities are able to ride together.  Ride at your own pace, and the band will keep you with the group.  Explore the worlds of Zwift with the friendly EZR crew and make this your new Wednesday ride!

#zer #ezr #ezriders

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Volcano Circuit CCW
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: SWX Wednesday Tempo by Coach Cindy 🇬🇧 🇳🇱 🇦🇪
description:
Build strength and control every Wednesday with SWX Tempo — a steady endurance builder designed to grow your aerobic engine.
Crafted by Coach Cindy (Train Smart = Race Stronger), this session focuses on sustained tempo efforts to improve muscular endurance, pacing, and long-ride efficiency. Bring smooth cadence, mental focus, and your best zone 3 vibes!

• All levels welcome
• Stay-together mode enabled
• Late join allowed

Connect and learn more about who we are:
📸 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/shark_worx_swx
🌐 Website: https://bit.ly/Visit_Coach_Cindy

name: Cycle Nation Banded Route of the Week Knees Up
description:
Welcome to the Cycle Nation Banded Route of the Week Knees Up. Everyone is welcome to join us to complete Zwift's Route of the Week, grab the bonus XP and have a good knees up. This is a banded ride, where everyone stays together as long as they are pedalling.		
Join our Facebook Group: https://bit.ly/38TTtAh		
Join our Zwift Team: https://bit.ly/3D2Q4zL		
Join our Strava Club: https://bit.ly/3pEDkFM		
Instagram: https://bit.ly/3pEsdN6

name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro (B)

name: TEAM ITALY From Walk to Run 5K
description:
WELCOME TO ALL RUNNERS! 5Km running is your goal? This is a Run-Walk-Run event, that which will help you to start running, to return after an injury, to increase your training or simply to train for weelness. The event is structured as workouts to give you the opportunity to manage the paces according to your personal pace references for a functional aerobic improvement training. Each workout will include initial walking warm up, so please set your treadmills to exit the starting pen all in group walking and follow the subsequent messages on the screen. The Running Division of Team Italy is a new reality that is added to the already more acclaimed Bike Division. It was born from the passion between two runner friends, zwift users, and boss of Team, which we thanks. So, we hope you enjoy with us. Also in the other events, which you can find on our Facebook page. Please, add tag [ITA] after your name. Stay connected with other runners via our Team Italy Discord Server (Running/Corsa Section - Audio Channel) https://discord.gg/c7PGKGv

This is the Facebook group of Team Italy Runners https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftrunningitaly/

 , and Team Italy https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftitaly

 Join us! Have fun! Run On!. #zwiftrunningitaly #teamitaly Benvenuti a tutti i Runners ! Il vostro obiettivo è quello di correre 5km?Questo è un evento Corsa-Camminata-Corsa, che potrà aiutarvi ad iniziare a correre, a rientrare dopo un infortunio, ad incrementare il vostro allenamento o semplicemente per il benessere. L’evento è strutturato come workouts per darvi la possibilità di gestire le andature secondo i vostri personali riferimenti di passo per un allenamento funzionale di miglioramento aerobico. Ogni workouts prevedrà un riscaldamento camminando, quindi vi preghiamo di impostare i vostri Tapis Roulant per uscire dalla griglia di partenza tutti in gruppo camminando e seguire a video i successivi messaggi. La Divisione Running del Team Italy è una recente realtà aggiunta alla già acclamata divisione Cycling. Nata dalla passione di due amici runners, utenti Zwift, ed il Boss del Team Italy, che ringraziamo. Grazie anche a voi, ed alla vostra passione questa realtà sta crescendo e divenendo sempre più attiva. Per tutte le info necessarie potete trovare la nostra pagina Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftrunningitaly/

 La pagina del Team Italy: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftitaly

 ed il canale Discord, Running audio channel, per tenerci in contatto: https://discord.gg/c7PGKGv

name: Thomson Bike Tours Endurance Ride
description:
This is a no leader event, just group up with other riders of similar ability and enjoy the social aspect of Zwift. Your goal should be to complete 1 hr of riding at YOUR endurance pace. The overall group will split and smaller groups will form naturally ensuring that everyone gets a good workout and has a bit of fun.
Brought to you by Thomson Bike Tours and CCNS.

The ride is open to all riders, whether you're a Thomson Bike Tours previous guest or not.

Complete the ride to unlock the exclusive Thomson Bike Tours cycling kit.

About Thomson Bike Tours:
Thomson Bike Tours is the Premier Official Tour Operator to the Tour de France and Tour de France Femmes avec Zwift.
https://www.thomsonbiketours.com/

Find us on Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/thomsonbiketours/

About CCNS:
Charles Coaching & Nutrition Services provides highly tailored coaching, testing and nutrition for endurance athletes. https://www.charlescoaching.com/

name: Group Run 10k
description:
Join us for a 10k group run.   It's run-at-your-own-pace and all are welcome! 

Pick the closest pace group for you, but all groups will start together and you are free to fall back and run ahead. The pace groups designate average pace for the duration of the run. Most groups will start slower and finish faster than the indicated pace. Feel free to mix in some intervals and race your friends. #pbt

name: Workout Wednesday Run
description:
Join the Zwift Runners for a group run workout that will be of benefit to all distance runners.

The speeds for each group are based on a threshold speed of A group 15 kph, B 13 kph, C 11 kph, D 9 kph. We will start the intervals at that speed but increase the speed of the intervals we get into the workout. We encourage runners to choose the group closest to the effort level you want to run at and to keep to the nominal speed for that group to maintain the group dynamic. However if these speeds are significantly too low or high for you then you can choose to run in the group that is closest and then adjust the target speed up to 10% up or down in the game or via the Companion app.

If you have any questions about this event or want to find out more about Zwift Running in general then please visit the Zwift Runners Facebook group or zwift.com/run #gozwiftrun #wow

name: Applewood Cycling Chase Race
description:
If you enjoy the Applewood Manor Cycling weekly group ride, we now have a race version structured similarly to the group ride dynamic.   

The time of day, course and distance are the same:  15:30 UTC, 2 laps of the Douce course #doubledraft.  

But in our chase race you can select your category and get a head start on faster riders and, of course , results count!  

We encourage group conversation during the race and our goal is to create a challenging but also social and entertaining competition.   

Please follows us on Strava and join our Applewood Cycling club and follow us on  Instagram @applewood_manor.  Visit our Facebook page at https://www.facebook.com/theapplewoodmanor for information about our B&B and our cycling program and to leave comments and suggestions.  Website: www.applewoodmanor.com

name: SROZ's No Stress Express
description:
Leave the ego at the starting pen!								
Whether you’re a total beginner finding your legs, a veteran rider flushing out the lactic acid on a recovery day, or just someone who wants to enjoy the scenery without staring at their power meter—this is your ride.								
Why join the Express?								
We use Zwift’s "Keep Together" (banded) feature. As long as you keep pedaling, you’ll stay with the group regardless of your power output. 								
Zero Drop Policy: No one gets left behind. Period.								
								
This is a chat-heavy ride. Connect with fellow Zwifters, share tips, or just listen to the hum of the virtual tarmac.								
								
All Abilities Welcome: From 0.5 w/kg to 5.0 w/kg, everyone is equal on the Express!

name: Stage 4 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 4
Route: Sand and Sequoias
Date: April 6-12

Wrap up the Zwift Big Spin down on Sand and Sequoias, with loads of prizes still on deck!

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt9 RUN

name: SWX Wednesday Tempo by Coach Cindy
description:
Build strength and control every Wednesday with SWX Tempo — a steady endurance builder designed to grow your aerobic engine.
Crafted by Coach Cindy (Train Smart = Race Stronger), this session focuses on sustained tempo efforts to improve muscular endurance, pacing, and long-ride efficiency. Bring smooth cadence, mental focus, and your best zone 3 vibes!

• All levels welcome
• Stay-together mode enabled
• Late join allowed

Connect and learn more about who we are:
📸 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/shark_worx_swx

name: EVO CC Sprint Race Series
description:
CATEGORY ENFORCEMENT IS ENABLED FOR ALL EVO RACES!

What is Category Enforcement? 

Category Enforcement will prevent Zwifters from entering a category they are not eligible for.  Our goal is to increase fairness in racing.

HOW DOES IT WORK?

- Zwift checks a racer's past performance using VO2 max and FTP to determine their race category.
- Racers can join a category at or above their category. For example, if you are "C" category, you can race in C, B, or A category. You will not be able to race in the D category and the option to join will be absent.

Welcome to EVO sprintrace series. Shorter more compact races for the rider looking for an effective high intensity race. Start fast, hang on in the middle, then sprint for the win at the finish. Expect to push your heart rate to its maximum. Sprinkle a few of these into your training plan and watch your fitness grow.

To make racing as fair as possible we have enforced a few minor rules that will result in automatic disqualification on ZwiftPower.

All riders must wear a heart rate monitor
Riding in an incorrect category.

zPower riders will be disqualified in A, B, and C Podium. zPower is allowed in the D category. Race details and final results will be available at www.zwiftpower.com

#evo

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt10 BIKE
description: WTRL's Duathlon League offers a unique and thrilling racing experience by combining biking on Zwift with the choice of running on Zwift or outside in real life. This makes it accessible to everyone and the ultimate test of racing versatility!

name: Watts up Wednesday: Route of the Week
description:
Midweek watts with maximum fun (and maybe a little fudge 🍫). Join the Slackers crew every Wednesday for a social spin where the focus is on good vibes, steady wheels, and a bit of cheeky banter.

We’ll keep the pace friendly, regroup after climbs, and make sure no slacker gets left behind. Perfect for shaking out the legs, chasing a few watts, and rewarding yourself with some well-earned biscuits after.

Details:
    •    💨 Pace: Social / Endurance (no-drop if you stick together)
    •    📍 Route: Varies weekly (Zwift Route of the Week)
    •    🎯 Goal: Keep it steady, stay together, have fun, and get some extra XP

Grab your kit, clip in, and come spin with the Fudging Slackers – where riding hard is optional, but laughing hard is guaranteed.

eventSubgroups.name: Watts up Wednesday: Route of the Week (C)

name: Team Italy Workout Series by Manuel Ferrari
description:
Welcome to the Team Italy High-Intensity WORKOUT Series, written by Manuel Ferrari (Manuel Bike Experience) open to all riders with the aim of improving your FTP and preparing for the next races.

The appointment will be for every Tuesday and Thursday evening and is connected with the workouts that we offer every Wednesday evening during the Team Italy Up and Down Intervals event.

Have you always dreamed of completing a ride of over 100 km? Participating in both Team Italy Up and Down Intervals events and today's workout on consecutive days will improve your endurance and transform your ride of over 100 km into a fun ride.

Please add the [ITA] tag after your name,
Your kit will be automatically selected, and all riders will appear with the same kit.
All riders will unlock our exclusive in-game kit at the end of the workout.

How the ERG workout mode works:
The Zwifters line up in the starting area like a normal event and once it starts the workout mode begins. Each one will stay together with the group regardless of the power supplied, calculated on the basis of your FTP current.

We strongly recommend that you perform one of the FTP tests, if this is not correctly estimated it could make the workout too demanding for your current level of preparation, or ineffective. For more information about FTP go to: https://support.zwift.com/hc/en-us/articles/210208083-What-is-FTP-and-how-is-it-used-in-Zwift
This is the Facebook group of Team Italy
https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftitaly
and Strava club of Team Italy
https://www.strava.com/clubs/zwift_italy
This is the Manuel Bike Experience Youtube channel where you can relive some Workout and other interesting related topics:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvkG00ZD9Td2LXMKkeu1R3Q
Join us! Have fun! Ride On!
#teamitaly #jerseyunlock

name: ZTPL Cycling Club Sprint Training Session
description:
Weszliśmy w sezon wiosenno-letni.
Część naszych eventów zostaje w kalendarzu, ale może zdarzyć się tak że nie będzie na nich naszych liderów jazd.
Jeśli tak się zdarzy, gorąca prośba do Was o jazdę wg. założeń danego eventu.

◾️W planie środowych sesji znajdziecie klasykę sprintowych męczarni: krótkie bomby, dłuższe bomby, przyspieszenia, odcinki na pełnym gazie i te momenty, kiedy zaczynasz się zastanawiać, po co znowu tu przyszedłeś.
◾️Całość przygotował Dawid Rataj Cycling Coach https://www.instagram.com/ratajcyclistcoach/ - więc będzie bolało, ale przynajmniej z sensem.
Wpadajcie — bo nawet jeśli sprint nigdy nie stanie się naszą mocną stroną, to przynajmniej będziemy mogli udawać, że solidnie trenowaliśmy.

◾️Nasze eventy ZTPL Cycling Club wrócą ponownie na jesień 2026.
Póki co RIDE ON i korzystajcie z pogody, a jeśli nie możecie to bawcie się dobrze podczas naszych eventów.

◾️Jeśli chcecie sprawić sobie już teraz naszą nową teamową koszulkę ZTPL Cycling Club zapraszamy bezpośrednio na stronę https://inoni.cc/?s=ztpl&post_type=product
◾️Cała gama naszych koszulek oraz informacje o kolejnych Pre-Orderach znajdziecie na https://ztpl.cc/stroje-ztpl-cc/

◾️Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ZwiftPolska
◾️Grupa na facebooku: Polska Społeczność Zwift https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwift.polska
◾️Instagram: #ZTPLCyclingClub https://www.instagram.com/ztpl.cc/
◾️Strava: https://www.strava.com/clubs/182377
◾️Nasz klub w Companionie: https://www.zwift.com/eu/clubs/ztplcc
◾️Nasze wszystkie klubowe jazdy: https://www.zwift.com/eu/events/tag/ztplcc
◾️Nasza strona internetowa: https://ztpl.cc/

#RideOn #ZTPLCC

[ENG]
We’re now in the spring and summer season.
Some of our events will stay in the calendar, but there may be times when our ride leaders won’t be there. If that happens, we’d really appreciate it if you could still ride according to the plan of the event.

Wednesday’s sessions are packed with the classic sprint pain cave: short efforts, longer efforts, accelerations, full-gas sections, and those moments when you start asking yourself why you showed up again.
The whole thing was put together by Dawid Rataj Cycling Coach https://www.instagram.com/ratajcyclistcoach/ — so it’s going to hurt, but at least it’ll hurt for a reason.
Come along — because even if sprinting never becomes our strong point, at least we’ll be able to pretend we’ve trained properly.

Our ZTPL Cycling Club events will be back in autumn 2026.
For now — RIDE ON, enjoy the good weather, and if you can’t, just have a great time at our events.

◾️If you would like to get yourself our ZTPL Cycling Club team jersey please visit our shop https://inoni.cc/en/?s=ztpl&post_type=product
or you can order our Casual T-Shirt and Hoodies https://wintertal.com/en/133-ztplcc

eventSubgroups.name: ZTPL Cycling Club Sprint Training Session (E)
eventSubgroups.description:
Przez lata próbowałem…no i jak widać – dalej próbuję, a koledzy nie pomagają.

Dziękuje im przy okazji za propozycję nazwy dla naszego treningu:
Wesoły: PRZEGRAJ SPRINT JAK TARACH
Chudy: NIEsprintuj z Tarachem 
Sprintuj PRZED Tarachem

Do rzeczy, zapraszam Was na cotygodniowy trening, który poprowadze ja Ojciec Dyretor Taraluch.

W planie klasyka sprintowych męczarni:
krótkie bomby, dłuższe bomby, przyspieszenia, odcinki na pełnym gazie i takie momenty, w których zastanawiasz się, dlaczego znowu tu przyszedłeś. Ja wiem muszę wygrać sprint z Chudinim.

Całą zabawę przygotował Dawid RatajCyclingCoach, więc będzie bolało, ale z sensem.

Wpadaj, bo nawet jeśli sprint nie wyjdzie nam nigdy…to przynajmniej będziemy udawać, że coś trenowaliśmy

name: Workout 2 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 2: Body Control
This one’s got a little bit of everything: single-leg drills, hand positioning, and calm upper-body control are all on deck, keeping you confident and smooth from start to finish.

name: Stage 2: Pas Racing: Handful of Gravel
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: DBR Midweek Social Ride
description:
Join Danish Bike Riders on our weekly Social Ride. We will be riding at an average pace of 30-35km for 60min, mostly flat routes, but some routes are faster than others. We ride without the Fence, and perhaps also a bit different from many other Social Rides. RideLeader will keep a steady pace, but its ok to ride ahead and join other riders in front - Just remember to be Social. If you find yourself at the back, please call for a wheel, and we will try to get you back to the RideLeaders group. Stronger riders are as always welcome to help at the back. We look forward to ride with you.

Info on events and the [DBR] team can be found on “Danish Bike Riders” on FaceBook (English) https://www.facebook.com/DanishBikeRiders and in our group “Danish Bike Riders” https://www.facebook.com/groups/1160541327367604/ 

Ride On

#dbr

name: Epic Run Crew: Wednesday Waddle
description:
You are halfway through the work week! Congratulations! Should you waddle to the finish line or push the pace a bit? You decide!

This is a 35 minute group run. You are welcome to run at your own pace (AYOP). Chatting is encouraged! Talk about food. Make a funny observation. Whatever. We don’t judge. Just have some fun!

Epic Run Crew is based in Vancouver, BC, Canada. We were founded as an in-person club in 2021 and then joined Zwift in June 2022.

Use the Zwift Companion app to join the Epic Run Crew club, for access to exclusive member-only group runs.

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/epicruncrew2/
Instagram: @epicruncrew

name: T-VGN 🌱 Mixed Salad
description:
Jump on for a social spin with a global team of vegan cycling enthusiasts who share the passion of the indoor cycling e-sport while living a compassionate, plant-based lifestyle.

Our events are open for everyone, vegan and non-vegan. You will find us chatty, supportive and encouraging. Feel free to ask if you have questions but most importantly - enjoy the ride!

name: Team DRAFT Wednesday Race
description:
WHAT IS CATEGORY ENFORCEMENT?

Category Enforcement will prevent Zwifters from entering a category they are not eligible for. Our goal is to increase fairness in racing.

HOW DOES IT WORK?

- Zwift checks a racer's past performance using VO2 max and FTP to determine their race category.
- Racers can join a category at or above their category. For example, if you are "C" category, you can race in C, B, or A category. You can not race in the D category.

Welcome to the Wednesday Race brought to you by Team DRAFT!

We encourage all participants to head over to zwiftpower.com and register. Riders who have not completed the Zwiftpower registration and agreed to the sharing conditions will not be included in the official results.

To make this race as fair as possible, we require that all riders wear a heart rate monitor, use a power meter and/or smart trainer, and choose the appropriate race category for your ability. Riding in an inappropriate category will lead to your disqualification.

RULES:
- No zPower riders.
- Heart rate monitors mandatory for all categories
- 5min and 20min CEVAZ limits apply. Riding in the wrong category will lead to disqualification.

RACE CATEGORIES:
A: 4.0 W/kg to 5.0 W/kg
B: 3.2 W/kg to 3.99 W/kg
C: 2.5 W/kg to 3.19 W/kg
D: Under 2.49 W/kg

name: Veterans Mid-Week ride hosted by Invictus Games Foundation
description:
Join our mid-week social ride led by members of the Invictus Games Foundation’s international community of serving military personnel and veterans who use cycling to recover from wounds, injury or sickness (WIS).

This is a 1-2 w/kg weekly group ride, with the goal of keeping the group together. This event is open to riders of any ability, including those who ride upright bikes, and we especially welcome those who use handcycles, recumbent trikes, trikes, or tandems in real life.

Follow the ride leader's instructions and stay as close to the beacon as possible. If you're feeling strong, please use your abilities to help pull fellow riders back to the pack. If you are feeling weak, join the lantern rouge at the back for a more leisurely ride

This is a social ride, not a race. Use the draft, take a coffee break.

Late joiners allowed.

If you are a member of the WIS community and happy to let the group know, please write [IGF] after your name on your profile.
For more information about the Invictus Games Foundation please go to https://invictusgamesfoundation.org/

eventSubgroups.name: Veterans Mid-Week ride hosted by Invictus Games Foundation (E)

name: Stage 1 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 1
Route: Flat Out Fast
Date: March 16-22

The adventure kicks off on Flat Out Fast—where the name of the game is no hills and Big Spin prizes galore!

name: Team Italy Specialissima Race
description:
Welcome to Specialissima Race.

All will start with 1 minute between RS categories.
Expect each race to be highly competitive and have fun!.

CATEGORIES:
Each race will be using Zwift Racing Score (ZRS) for categorization.
Race up a category if your RS is at the top end of a category.
Or if you simply desire an added challenge.

- A: 690 - 1000
- B: 520 - 690
- C: 350 - 520
- D: 180 - 350
- E: 0 - 180

Your Zwift Racing Score is determined by how much success you have in races.
better against people with higher ZRS, then your ZRS may increase. If you place worse than people with lower ZRS, then your score might decrease.
Read more about ZRS here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-BkG9_Rqrh
If your ZRS increases past a category boundary during the series, your points earned will not transfer to the new category with you.

RULES:
A smart trainer or power meter is required.
zPower will be removed.
Heart rate monitors are compulsory for all categories.
No TT bikes unless it's a TT event.
You need to have a registered account with zwiftpower.com and accept their terms and conditions to be in the results of the race.

PLEASE NOTE:
Race organizers may request riders in all categories to provide a dual recording or a matching RL effort (Strava) in order to verify a Zwift race effort. Failure to comply may result in disqualification from the event. Failure to provide a dual recording or RL effort on three requests may result in disqualification from future events until a dual recording with a matching effort is provided.
Race organizers may exclude a rider from the results due to poor sportsmanship. Examples may be bad language, sandbagging, or other behavior in a disruptive manner.

This is the FB group of Team Italy https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftitaly and Strava Club https://www.strava.com/clubs/zwift_italy

Ride On!

#teamitaly

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt10 RUN
description: WTRL's Duathlon League offers a unique and thrilling racing experience by combining biking on Zwift with the choice of running on Zwift or outside in real life. This makes it accessible to everyone and the ultimate test of racing versatility!

name: Ride Club Finland: DNF Elite
description:
DNF Elite is a scratch race for riders who know that FTP doesn’t define glory - attitude does. Whether you spin like a sleepy hamster or grind like a coffee machine, this is your stage. 
 
Here, “DNF” stands for “Do Not Fret” - because finishing is optional, but fun is mandatory. Every effort counts, even the ones that end in the pain cave or the pizza queue.
 
A - Almost Elite: top tier of the not-so-top, pain faces guaranteed, results optional.
B - Bonk Buddies: we start strong, fade fast, and always blame the trainer.
C - Chain-drop Champions: still figuring out which gear to use - and proud of it!
 
Rules & Spirit 
- Category: choose the one that matches your ZRS - or your sense of humor.
- Excuses: unlimited.Sandbagging: only if it’s a yoga move. 
- Occasional “why did I sign up for this again?” moments. 
- Everyone’s a winner, some just cross the line a bit later.
 
Join the Ride Club Finland: DNF Elite peloton and celebrate the fine art of trying just hard enough. See you at the start pens — bring watts, wit, and your finest self-deprecating spirit.

name: GXY LOOSEY GOOSEY [1.6-2.0WKG] CAT D
description:
Welcome to GXY Loosey Goosey!

This is our mid-week sociable recovery spin.

This is most definitely not a race.  We ride as a team, we help and support each other with the primary aim of enjoying a chilled 60 minutes.

GXY are a friendly and supportive club who strive to help others succeed.  We are looking forward to riding with you.

If you want to become a member and join our community to race, ride socially, or both, please come and join ideally via our Facebook link or by the email below:

name: Hercules - Hump Day, Midweek Recovery Shake Out
description:
Join our Hump Day Midweek Recovery Shake Out - a super friendly and inclusive group ride on Zwift! We ride with the rubber band enabled, so no one gets dropped, and everyone stays together no matter the pace.

Expect great chat, good vibes, quizzes, fun facts and a welcoming atmosphere for all riders, whether you're new to Zwift or a seasoned pro.

Please join our Zwift Club at https://www.zwift.com/uk/clubs/d6581e47-deb2-46ed-a278-5777d5d2fd0f/home

Please join our Facebook Group at https://www.facebook.com/groups/2606407819659263/

Please join us online at https://herculesrunningandtri.com/

Please join us on Strava at https://www.strava.com/clubs/herculesrunningandtriclub

If you would like to own our famous Pink & Black Club Kit in real life, please order at https://tinyurl.com/herculestrirun

name: SZR Cycling Enthusiasts
description:
Welcome to the SZR Cycling Enthusiasts Social Group Ride.
- The goal with this group ride is to focus on the group and keeping the group together the entire ride.
- We ride at 2.2 to 2.6 wkg for the most of the ride
- This is a social group ride and not a race and staying close to the ride leader is the key.
- Please follow the ride leaders instructions at all times.
- After steep hills we focus on keeping the group together and soft pedal to let the group come together again.
Use our discord if you like to have a chat with the people on the ride
https://discord.gg/DQHybQT

name: Vitality for UNICEF Group Ride
description:
Vitality, in partnership with UNICEF, is teaming up with Zwift for a series of great social rides for a fantastic cause. Don’t miss out. Join our social rides of 45 minutes to one hour and do your part to give kids a head start. Keeping you active and helping Vitality and UNICEF vaccinate millions of children worldwide.

We encourage everyone to stay together for this social ride. Every ride completion will help UNICEF vaccinate a child against polio.

About Vitality:
 
Guided by a core purpose of making people healthier, Vitality is the leader in shared-value by creating healthy behavior changes in insurance. By blending technology, data, incentives, and behavioural science, Vitality inspires healthy changes in individuals and organizations. 

In partnership with UNICEF, Vitality aims to vaccinate millions of children against polio by donating vaccines on behalf of participants who complete the Vitality for UNICEF Ride series events.

Furthermore, the partnership with Zwift has been established as part of Vitality’s global pledge to get 100 million people 20% more active by 2025 through incentives to live healthier, more active lifestyles.
